pull.title: nuke: wallet
pull.body:
remove wallet from docs, tests, src.

todo: create a 2140 wallet that connects to this node

verification.payload:
tree 8f8f775ea964ac92536031f3a24b3c60d47b7eed
parent 10ca73c02cbff59f2134c0c7da3b8d0a7e727475
author rustaceanrob <rob.netzke@gmail.com> 1778575995 +0100
committer rustaceanrob <rob.netzke@gmail.com> 1778575995 +0100

build: remove GUI (bitcoin-qt) from build system

Remove all CMake options, modules, and deployment logic related to the
Qt GUI: BUILD_GUI, WITH_QRENCODE, WITH_DBUS, BUILD_GUI_TESTS, Qt 6.2
package discovery, FindQt.cmake, FindQRencode.cmake, the macOS app
bundle deploy target, and share/qt translation/plist files. Update the
Windows NSIS installer and ENABLE_IPC description accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

events.message:

Qt GUI: BUILD_GUI, WITH_QRENCODE, WITH_DBUS, BUILD_GUI_TESTS, Qt 6.2

Windows NSIS installer and ENABLE_IPC description accordingly.

author rustaceanrob <rob.netzke@gmail.com> 1778578263 +0100
committer rustaceanrob <rob.netzke@gmail.com> 1778578263 +0100

gui: remove src/qt/, init stubs, and all GUI references

Delete the entire src/qt/ directory, both GUI init implementations
(bitcoin-qt.cpp, bitcoin-gui.cpp), the Qt translation lint script, and
the Qt translation process doc. Update all references to bitcoin-qt and
bitcoin-gui throughout source files, CI scripts, contrib tools, and
documentation.

events.message:

Delete the entire src/qt/ directory, both GUI init implementations
(bitcoin-qt.cpp, bitcoin-gui.cpp), the Qt translation lint script, and
the Qt translation process doc. Update all references to bitcoin-qt and

author rustaceanrob <rob.netzke@gmail.com> 1778578802 +0100
committer rustaceanrob <rob.netzke@gmail.com> 1778579551 +0100

gui: remove remaining Qt/GUI references from CI, docs, and config

Remove -DBUILD_GUI=OFF and Qt package dependencies from CI scripts,
drop -DBUILD_GUI_TESTS=OFF from guix and libmultiprocess build scripts,
delete the Transifex config, and remove translation workflow references
from README, CONTRIBUTING, and release docs.
